segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Yes. I'm new to Boston, and I wanted to spend some time here.

segments.speaker: Librarian
segments.text: Welcome. Are you looking for anything specific?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: A quiet reading room, and maybe architecture or urban history books if they're easy to find.

segments.speaker: Librarian
segments.text: The reading room is upstairs. Architecture is on the second floor, and local history is nearby.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Great. Do I need a library card to sit and read?

segments.speaker: Librarian
segments.text: No, only if you want to borrow materials.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Good to know. Is photography allowed in the public areas?

segments.speaker: Librarian
segments.text: Yes, just no flash and be respectful of other visitors.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Of course. The building is beautiful, so I wanted to take a few reference photos.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Thank you. This might become one of my favorite places in the city.
